name: netknife-backend
description: NetKnife backend Lambda functions and tests

scripts.test: npm run prepare:shared && node --test shared/netknife-common/*.test.js functions/dns/*.test.js functions/headers/*.test.js functions/tls/*.test.js functions/rdap/*.test.js functions/traceroute/*.test.js functions/board/*.test.js functions/guides/*.test.js functions/profile/*.test.js functions/billing/*.test.js
